case_title: KEVIN FERNANDO MARADIAGA VS. ASPIRE GENERAL INSURANCE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE AND FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR PLAINTIFF TO FEB-06-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APPEARED. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARADIAGA, KEVIN FERNANDO AS TO DEFENDANT ASPIRE GENERAL INSURANCE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-18-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ASPIRE GENERAL INSURANCE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF KEVIN FERNANDO MARADIAGA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ASPIRE GENERAL INSURANCE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF APPEARED AND STATED HE HAD BEEN PAID IN FULL BY ASPIRE GENREAL INSURANCE AND WOULD LIKE THIS MATTER DISMISSED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
